pi_items.source: Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py strictly enforce at least 50 trajectory steps.
Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py strictly enforce at least 2 static obstacles.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly refer to this CSV path.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly refer to this JSON path.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly refer to this TTT scene artifact path.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the programmatic construction of a robot workcell scene in CoppeliaSim from scratch. Verified that the expected trajectory minimum steps (50), minimum evaluated obstacles (2), and all output file paths (clearance_audit.csv, audit_summary.json, and audit_scene.ttt) explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
